caveat: Best valid candidate (spec_v2-only, 25.38%) with corrected scorer isolation (--remove-path cookiecutter). Earlier high scores (97.81%) were invalid: reference-path leakage, target-package PyPI install, and scorer source-package shadowing. Spec detail experiment showed v2-only outperforms patched packet and v3/v4 variants.

scorer_isolation.source_shadowing_guard: Remove the source package path from the copied oracle worktree before scoring, then require preflight stdout to point into candidate output.
scorer_isolation.verification_status: recommended_not_historically_recorded; rerun scoring before using as a final candidate score

coverage-gap.requires_action: No Gate D action required under current-main audit.
